architecture.summary: FL_JS: ComfyUI chat interface with MCP server backend, now with extra_model_paths.yaml support

comfy_tools.description: Core ComfyUI filesystem utilities with multi-path support from extra_model_paths.yaml

comfy_models.description: Pydantic models for ComfyUI tool requests and responses

mcp_server.description: FastMCP server exposing ComfyUI tools via MCP protocol

extra_model_paths_loader.description: Loader for extra_model_paths.yaml configuration - finds and parses YAML

path_resolver.description: Path resolution and merging for model paths - handles base_path, pipes, validation

relationships.relationship: mcp_server calls comfy_tools methods to implement tool endpoints
comfy_tools uses comfy_models for type definitions and validation
comfy_tools uses loader and resolver during __init__ to build folder_mappings with extra paths
loader provides parsed configs to resolver for path resolution and merging
comfy_tools stores resolved folder_mappings as Dict[ComfyFolderType, List[Path]] from resolver

focus: copy layout_engine.js and modify 3 files for dual-mode layout
last_change: Fixed modify_layout to support auto-layout mode with graceful error handling
recommendation: Proceed with implementation - clear path forward with medium complexity
architecture_clarification: FL_API contains ComfyUI manipulation, tool_executor is routing layer
root_cause: tool_executor._handleModifyLayout missing auto-layout mode support and null check for node_rects
